webVerification.notes: Web confirms 914-305-5336 as NAACP Rochester Branch 2172 contact line. President: Kiesha Ivey. Email: naacp2172@gmail.com. Mailing: P.O. Box 14305, Rochester NY 14614. Note: 914 area code is unusual for Rochester — likely a board member's contact line, not a Rochester office line.
